brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 65.7% via correct complement rule application; goes one level beyond the surface by identifying why the additive approach fails, but no second-order analysis; no explicit monitoring of own reasoning process or assumption-checking at any point; no verification from a different angle or sanity check performed; presents the conclusion with full confidence and no uncertainty framing, though notes a minor caveat about small-probability approximations; addresses the friend's additive alternative and explains its failure mode briefly but does not systematically evaluate other possible approaches; the full derivation chain (1 − (0.7)³ = 1 − 0.343 = 0.657) is explicitly shown and reproducible by a third party
